description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a hip roof, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped garden. The front features a prominent entryway with a small porch, steps, and a decorative gate, flanked by a detached garage on one side. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the main facade, while the rear of the house opens to a patio area with outdoor furniture and a glass-enclosed sunroom. Mature trees and shrubs are distributed throughout the yard, providing shade and privacy. The house has a classic suburban appearance, with paved walkways and a driveway leading to the garage. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, making it suitable for a family in an urban neighborhood.
description: A two-story brick house with a hip roof, landscaped yard, detached garage, and symmetrical windows. Features include a front porch, rear patio, and mature garden elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, decorative gate, and attached garage with landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the plain brick wall, minimal windows, and garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, glass sunroom, outdoor furniture, and lush backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, paved driveway, and additional garden space with trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, decorative columns, and a metal gate
